content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于7月15日16:20(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年7月29日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。

【更新内容】

一、战斗

【相位对弈】
● 平衡性调整
    ○ 唤醒体
        ■ 「哈姆林」
            ● 狂气爆发「原初的乐音」：伤害由 12 降低为 10。
    ○ 命轮
        ■ 「好运时间」：现在仅在抽到「技能」时复制该卡牌，抽到其他类型卡牌时不复制。

二、问题修复

【故事】
● 本地化
    ○ 英语
        ■ 修复了钥令「巨人的霸道」的描述翻译不准确的问题。
    ○ 通用
        ■ 修复了多个语言设置下，部分活动规则、任务描述、唤醒说明等描述中，部分文本缺失或翻译错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了多个语言设置下，部分技能说明和状态效果描述中，命轮、献祭、算力上限等战斗术语的翻译错误的问题。修复后技能说明更完整，效果表达更准确。
        ■ 修复了多个语言设置下，部分唤醒体、物品、关卡描述及剧情文本中的错别字问题。

【战斗】
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了某些情况下通关非战斗关卡后，可能会出现卡住或崩溃的问题。
    ○ 修复了部分敌人的血条和意图显示位置会错误地偏移的问题。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了唤醒体「阿拉克涅」的「纺织」伤害错误地少了 1 点的问题。
    ○ 修复了命轮「好运时间」会错误地复制手牌而不是复制抽出的卡牌的问题。
    ○ 修复了命轮「好运时间」抽牌没有飘字提示的问题。
    ○ 修复了钥令「重逢心愿」会错误地在任意唤醒体死亡时清除当前模拟技能的问题。

**V2.5.2.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on  July 15, 2026 at 16:20(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on July 29, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update Content]

I. Combat

[Traphase]
● Balance Adjustments
○ Awakener
■ "Hameln"
● Exalt "Primal Chord": DMG reduced from 12 to 10.
○ Wheel of Destiny
■ "Hour of Fortune": Now only copies the Card when a "Skill" is drawn; does not copy Cards of other types.

2. Bug Fixes

[Story]
● Localization
○ English
■ Fixed an issue where the description translation of the Posse "Giant's Reign" was inaccurate.
○ General
■ Fixed an issue where, under multiple language settings, some text was missing or incorrectly translated in certain event rules, quest descriptions, Awaken descriptions, and other related content.
■ Fixed an issue where, under multiple language settings, certain Skill descriptions and State Effect descriptions contained translation errors for combat terms such as Wheel of Destiny, Sacrifice, and Arithmetica Limit. After this fix, Skill descriptions are more complete and Effect expressions are more accurate.
■ Fixed typos in certain Awakener, item, Stage descriptions, and Story text across multiple language settings.

[Combat]
● Stage
○ Fixed an issue where the game could get stuck or experience a Breakdown after Clearing non-combat Stages in certain situations.
○ Fixed an issue where the health bar and intent display positions of some enemies would incorrectly offset.

● Traphase
○ Fixed an issue where the "Weave" DMG of the Awakener "Arachne" was incorrectly reduced by 1.
○ Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Hour of Fortune" would incorrectly copy the Hand instead of copying the drawn Card.
○ Fixed an issue where drawing cards during the Wheel of Destiny "Hour of Fortune" had no floating text Hint.
○ Fixed an issue where the Posse "Reunion's Wish" would incorrectly clear the current simulated Skill upon the death of any Awakener.
Honestly the major thing was to hotfix the story crash problem, I think
The pvp bug finally fixed it<:Thumbsup:1356086340298473574>
